info.description: PHYSICAL items sold via the shop (jewellery, crystals, sage, gifts). For workshops, retreats, or programmes use the 'Experience' or 'Programme' collections instead — those are services with bookings, not items shipped to a customer.

slug.description: URL path after the slash. Lowercase, hyphens-not-spaces, no punctuation. Auto-fills from the name/title — only edit if you want to change the URL.

description_v2.description: Main product description. Select text and click the link icon to add a hyperlink — a popup will ask you for the URL. Bold, italic, headings, lists and quotes all work from the toolbar.

price.description: Amount in GBP (pounds and pence). Just the number — no currency symbol, no commas. Example: 49.99

is_featured.description: Generic featured flag (in-shop featured product carousel etc.).

is_homepage_featured.description: Show this product on the homepage 'Jewellery with meaning' preview row. Top 3 by sort_order are displayed.

homepage_hook.description: Italic message shown above the product name on the homepage card, e.g. 'I reach for this one when I need to remember what is underneath the noise.' Keep short, 1 sentence.

is_active.description: Untick to HIDE this entry from the public site without deleting it. Useful for seasonal items or things you're drafting privately.

tags.description: Comma-separated tags for filtering/search (e.g. 'best-seller, gift, new-in'). Leave blank if none.

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this page. Each card has an image + label + short blurb + link. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely. Example use: on the About page, point to the Reset Room and Reset Letters.
